summary: Iteration 36: Comprehensive testing of admin panel filter-options endpoint, new subscription/order filters, cs_ prefix deep-links, and patched data. All 24 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend UI verification checks pass (100%).

issues: Persistent hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <select>/<option>' - Emergent VE framework wrapper, non-blocking, confirmed non-fixable at app level.

critical_code_review_comments: All features implemented correctly and working end-to-end.
GET /api/admin/filter-options returns ALLOWED_ORDER_STATUSES, ALLOWED_SUBSCRIPTION_STATUSES, ALLOWED_PAYMENT_METHODS, ALLOWED_BANK_TRANSACTION_STATUSES from constants.py - working correctly.
pending_direct_debit_setup present in both subscription_statuses and order_statuses arrays.
SubscriptionsTab.tsx: 8 new filters verified (sub#, processorId, plan, status, payment, renewalFrom/To); status and payment dropdowns load from filter-options API.
OrdersTab.tsx: 8 new filters verified (email, order#, sub#, processorId, status, method, payDateFrom/To); status and method dropdowns load from filter-options API.
BankTransactionsTab.tsx: btStatuses state populated from filter-options; status dropdown shows matched/completed/pending/failed/refunded correctly.
cs_ prefix deep-link: SUB-7EF107CB processor_id=cs_test_a1B6W9Nuu0... renders as blue badge linking to https://dashboard.stripe.com/checkout/sessions/... - working correctly.
Patched data verified: AA-7BE7DB36 has subscription_number=SUB-7EF107CB and payment_date=2026-02-22; SUB-7EF107CB has renewal_date=2026-03-22.
Orders sub_number_filter=SUB-7EF correctly returns AA-7BE7DB36 showing SUB-7EF107CB in Sub# column.
getProcessorLink in both OrdersTab and SubscriptionsTab handles cs_ prefix correctly (7th prefix type added in this iteration).
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Tests relied on existing patched data (SUB-7EF107CB, AA-7BE7DB36).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 36 verified: (1) /api/admin/filter-options returns all 4 arrays from constants.py including pending_direct_debit_setup. (2) Subscriptions table has 8 filter inputs (sub#, processorId, plan, status dropdown from API, payment dropdown from API, renewalFrom, renewalTo + created/start/contractEnd ranges). (3) Orders table has sub#, processorId, payMethod, payDateFrom/To filters. (4) BankTransactionsTab btStatuses loaded from filter-options. (5) cs_ prefix generates stripe checkout session deep-link; SUB-7EF107CB processor_id=cs_test_a1B6W9... shows as blue clickable link. (6) Patched data AA-7BE7DB36 has sub#=SUB-7EF107CB and payment_date. (7) SUB-7EF107CB has renewal_date=2026-03-22. React hydration warning from Emergent VE wrapper is persistent but non-blocking.
